# Pull Request Summary

Provide a short summary of the changes introduced in this pull request.

## Type of Change

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Documentation (updates to guides, README, or API docs)
- [ ] Refactoring (code restructuring without changing public API behavior)
- [ ] Performance improvement (latency optimizations or resource overhead reduction)
- [ ] Tests (adding missing tests or extending test coverage)
- [ ] Build system (updates to CMake configuration or build scripts)
- [ ] Other (please specify in description)

## Description

- **What Changed**: Concise summary of code or file modifications.
- **Why It Changed**: Explanation of the problem solved or requirement fulfilled.
- **Implementation Notes**: Relevant design decisions or technical details.

## Testing

Please confirm the testing steps completed:

- [ ] Project builds successfully without compiler warnings (`-Werror`)
- [ ] All existing automated unit tests pass (`ctest --output-on-failure`)
- [ ] New unit tests added under `tests/` for new or modified logic (if applicable)
- [ ] Latency benchmarks executed under `benchmarks/` (if performance-related)

## Documentation

Please confirm documentation updates:

- [ ] `README.md` updated (if applicable)
- [ ] `docs/API.md` updated with API changes (if applicable)
- [ ] `docs/Examples.md` or `examples/` updated (if applicable)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if appropriate)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code adheres to project formatting and style guidelines (`.clang-format`)
- [ ] Changes are focused and minimal in scope
- [ ] No unnecessary, temporary, or scratch files included
- [ ] Documentation updated and verified
- [ ] Pull request is ready for maintainer review

## Additional Notes

Add any extra context, logs, test output, or reference links here.
